Cat BA week 1 incidence dataset

cat_ba_week1.Rd

Synthetic daily incidence data for 23 days used in package examples and vignette workflows.

Usage

cat_ba_week1

Format

A tibble with 23 rows and 3 columns:

day

Integer day index (1-23).

date

Date corresponding to each day.

incidence

Daily incidence count.

Source

See data-raw/provenance.md.

On this page
